description: Single-rhythm hot-swap (stageRhythmPreset) defers to the loop point AND changes content, via the per-rhythm staging path (distinct from A1's full-preset load). A9_base is a kick on every beat with a 2s master loop; a hat (.muRhythm) is staged onto slot 0 at 0.5s. The swap must defer to the 2.0s master boundary (kick keeps playing, centroid ~90 Hz) then commit (content becomes a hat, centroid ~10 kHz).

assertions.name: swap_deferred_kick_still_playing
assertions.comment: after staging at 0.5s the content is still the kick (low centroid) — the swap did NOT take effect immediately; it waits for the 2.0s loop point

assertions.name: content_swapped_to_hat
assertions.comment: after the master-boundary commit slot 0 is the hat (high centroid) — the per-rhythm swap applied
